creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 179546
py-django-statici18n.diff

This is an update to py-django-statici18n. This is a minor version update that looks more like a bug fix update. Builds fine on i386/amd64 on all supported FreeBSD versions fine. portlint is also happy.

* Updated to 1.3.0

 - Pass language name instead of locale name on Django 1.10 (thanks @quantum5)
 - Fix circle-ci builds


portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.


poudriere bulk -tC:
